stories.name: Primary
stories.snippet: const Primary = () => <Button variant="primary" size="md">Run Command</Button>;

stories.name: Secondary
stories.snippet: const Secondary = () => <Button variant="secondary" size="md">Attach Session</Button>;

stories.name: Ghost
stories.snippet: const Ghost = () => <Button variant="ghost" size="md">Open Logs</Button>;

stories.name: Danger
stories.snippet: const Danger = () => <Button variant="danger" size="md">Terminate Process</Button>;

stories.name: Loading
stories.snippet: const Loading = () => <Button variant="primary" size="md" loading>Deploying</Button>;

stories.name: Large
stories.snippet: const Large = () => <Button variant="primary" size="lg">Ship Build</Button>;

stories.name: Default
Checked
stories.snippet:
const Checked = () => <Checkbox
    label="Auto-reconnect"
    description="Reconnect the terminal session if the socket drops."
    defaultChecked />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <Checkbox
    label="Auto-reconnect"
    description="Reconnect the terminal session if the socket drops."
    disabled
    defaultChecked />;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Dropdown
    label="Target environment"
    placeholder="Choose environment"
    options={options} />;

stories.name: With Value
With Error
Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Input
    label="Command"
    placeholder="pnpm build"
    helperText="Use a shell command or script alias."
    leadingSlot="~/" />;

stories.name: With Hint
stories.snippet:
const WithHint = () => <Input
    label="Command"
    placeholder="grep -R \"TODO\" src"
    helperText="Use a shell command or script alias."
    leadingSlot="~/"
    hint="Optional" />;

stories.name: With Suffix
stories.snippet:
const WithSuffix = () => <Input
    label="Search logs"
    placeholder="request-id:abc123"
    helperText="Use a shell command or script alias."
    leadingSlot=">"
    trailingSlot="LIVE" />;

stories.name: Error
stories.snippet:
const Error = () => <Input
    label="API key"
    placeholder="sk-..."
    helperText="Use a shell command or script alias."
    leadingSlot="~/"
    error="A valid API key is required to continue." />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <Input
    label="Workspace path"
    placeholder="pnpm build"
    helperText="Use a shell command or script alias."
    leadingSlot="~/"
    value="/usr/local/projects/terminal-ui-react"
    disabled />;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <MultiSelect
    label="Telemetry channels"
    placeholder="Choose channels"
    options={options} />;

stories.name: With Values
With Error
Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Radio
    name="runtime"
    label="Node.js"
    description="Use the default runtime for local commands." />;

stories.name: Checked
stories.snippet:
const Checked = () => <Radio
    name="runtime"
    label="Node.js"
    description="Use the default runtime for local commands."
    defaultChecked />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <Radio
    name="runtime"
    label="Node.js"
    description="Use the default runtime for local commands."
    disabled />;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Textarea
    label="Deployment notes"
    placeholder="Add release notes, rollout steps, or shell snippets..."
    helperText="Markdown and code snippets are supported in the downstream app." />;

stories.name: With Error
stories.snippet:
const WithError = () => <Textarea
    label="Deployment notes"
    placeholder="Add release notes, rollout steps, or shell snippets..."
    helperText="Markdown and code snippets are supported in the downstream app."
    error="A summary is required before publishing the release." />;

stories.name: Default
Enabled
stories.snippet:
const Enabled = () => <Toggle
    label="Live tail mode"
    description="Keep streaming new log lines as they arrive."
    defaultChecked />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <Toggle
    label="Live tail mode"
    description="Keep streaming new log lines as they arrive."
    disabled
    defaultChecked />;
